projectDescription: A Bash-based advanced phishing tool with 30+ login page templates and multiple port-forwarding options for Linux and Termux.
keyFeatures: 30+ phishing page templates for major platforms (Facebook, Instagram, Google, Netflix, etc.)
5 port forwarding options: Localhost, Ngrok, Serveo, LocalXpose, LocalHostRun
Custom subdomain support for Serveo and LocalXpose tunnels
Real-time credential capture with live display and log file saving
Victim IP address detection and logging
Works on Linux and Termux (Android) environments
Interactive terminal menu with color-coded interface
publicApiSurface: bash nexphisher — Launch the interactive phishing tool
bash setup — Install dependencies on Linux (apt-based)
bash tmux_setup — Install dependencies on Termux (Android)

Template options: facebook, instagram, google, microsoft, netflix, paypal, steam, twitter, playstation, github, twitch, pinterest, snapchat, linkedin, ebay, dropbox, protonmail, spotify, reddit, adobe, deviantart, badoo, origin, cryptocoinsniper, yahoo, wordpress, yandex, stackoverflow, vk, xbox
Tunnel options: localhost (127.0.0.1:5555), ngrok, serveo, localxpose, localhostrun
Victim IP addresses saved to ip.txt
